title: Recommendation: Syphilis Infection During Pregnancy: Screening | United States Preventive Services Taskforce
text:

Screening for Syphilis Infection During Pregnancy 
Studies evaluating the benefits and harms of repeat screening later in pregnancy. 
Studies evaluating the benefits and harms of screening strategies during pregnancy that include rapid point-of-care tests. 
Studies evaluating interventions to reduce congenital syphilis rates in populations experiencing high burdens of disease.
Research evaluating disparities in congenital syphilis incidence and syphilis screening rates during pregnancy across populations. 
Abbreviations: USPSTF, US Preventive Services Task Force.
